profiles.title: Browser profile manager
profiles.subtitle: Build and maintain managed Firefox browser profiles. Supported: ESR 140.11, Release 151.
profiles.hero_note_body: Create drafts fast, validate policy flags before saving, then export the exact Firefox policies.json you need.
profiles.locale_note: Firefox policies.json import and export share one setup flow and one validation path.
profiles.theme_note: System mode follows your operating system unless you choose a fixed theme here.
profiles.editor_chrome_modes_body: Choose the mode by how much control you need: guided workflow, full visual settings, or raw JSON.
profiles.editor_chrome_guided_body: Task-first setup for the profile behavior most administrators change day to day.
profiles.editor_chrome_settings_body: Full visual catalog for every mapped policy, preference, and schema-backed control.
profiles.editor_chrome_json_body: Raw policies.json editing for exact keys, imports, troubleshooting, and final low-level checks.
profiles.editor_chrome_save_first: Save the profile first to open All settings or JSON in a separate tab.
profiles.dock_heading: Keep the next important action close
profiles.dock_body: Pick the schema and format above, then use this deck for validation, saving, recovery, and other profile-level actions.
profiles.workspace_scope_body: Use Guided editor for the normal path. Open All settings when you need the full visual catalog of browser controls or a deeper inspection pass.
profiles.workspace_scope_current_guided_: Stay in Guided editor for the main path
Use this mode when you are shaping how Firefox should behave for people. It is the safest and fastest path for normal profile work.
profiles.workspace_scope_current_setting: Use All settings for full visual control
Stay here only when you need lower-level browser controls, technical coverage gaps, or a deeper inspection pass before export.
profiles.workspace_scope_guided_copy: Start here when you want task-first setup, clearer presets, and the fastest path to a usable managed profile.
profiles.workspace_scope_settings_title: Only when Guided editor is not enough
profiles.workspace_scope_settings_copy: Use this for the full visual catalog, lower-level keys, settings-only areas, and detailed document review outside the main guided flow.
profiles.json_downloads_body: This link always reflects the saved profile record, so save first when your latest edits still need to become the handoff version.
profiles.sidebar_hint: Open an existing profile or start a new draft. The list updates as soon as your filters change.
profiles.workspace_overview_hint: Current profile context, schema, and active setup mode at a glance.
profiles.helper_no_selection_title: Choose a profile to start from
profiles.helper_no_selection_body: Pick any saved profile in the library on the left, or start a new draft. Once it is open, you can continue the browser setup below.
profiles.helper_selected_body: Adjust owner and description here, then continue the browser setup below and save when you're ready.
profiles.helper_clone_body: This draft starts from a saved profile. Keep what still fits, adjust only the variant-specific parts below, then save it as a separate profile.
profiles.selection_empty_meta: Open a saved profile or start a new draft.
profiles.selection_empty_status: Choose a profile or start a new draft to begin.
profiles.selection_active_status: Profile is open. Save or validate whenever you are ready.
profiles.dock_state_empty_title: Choose a profile to get started
profiles.details_hint: Profile details stay separate from browser rules here, which makes this form easier to scan.
profiles.actions_hint: Use Guided editor for the main path, then open All settings when you need lower-level controls, detailed coverage, or export troubleshooting.
profiles.workflow_body: Use this form for profile details and the guided flow for Firefox setup. Save creates a new profile, while updates keep the original name stable.
profiles.guide_step_one_body: Set a clear name, owner, and short description before you move into browser setup.
profiles.guide_step_two_body: The command deck above keeps validation, formatting, saving, and recovery in one predictable place.
profiles.guide_step_three_title: Export only when everything is green
profiles.guide_step_three_body: Once the draft is valid and saved, download the Firefox policies.json handoff file.
profiles.flow_support_body: Keep the library on the left for navigation, use this form for profile details, and keep All settings separate from Guided editor. That separation keeps setup faster and safer.
profiles.status_hint: Latest system feedback for the current profile.
profiles.description_placeholder: Short operational note for this profile
profiles.name_hint: Choose a unique name for a new profile draft.
profiles.name_locked: Profile name is locked after creation.
profiles.policy_disable_accounts_copy: Removes Firefox Account sign-in and sync entry points.
profiles.policy_disable_pocket_copy: Removes Pocket integration from the browser.
profiles.policy_password_manager_copy: Keeps the built-in password manager available to users.
profiles.policy_block_about_profiles_cop: Prevents users from switching or creating profiles in the browser UI.
profiles.policy_disable_devtools_copy: Blocks access to the built-in browser developer tools.
profiles.policy_disable_pdf_viewer_copy: Forces PDF handling outside Firefox instead of the embedded viewer.
profiles.policy_https_only_copy: Upgrades navigation to HTTPS whenever Firefox can do so safely.
profiles.policy_disable_app_update_copy: Stops Firefox application updates from being installed.
profiles.policy_disable_system_addon_upd: Prevents Mozilla system add-ons from updating in the background.
profiles.policy_save_logins_copy: Controls whether Firefox offers credential saving.
profiles.policy_prompt_downloads_copy: Prompts the user to choose a folder for each download.
profiles.policy_search_suggest_copy: Lets Firefox show provider suggestions while the user types in search.
profiles.compliance_summary_body: Saved CIS metadata for this profile.
profiles.compliance_summary_empty: No compliance overlay is attached to this profile.
profiles.empty_list: No profiles match the current filters right now.
profiles.list_click_hint: Open this profile to continue the browser setup.
profiles.confirm_soft_delete: Archive this profile? You can restore it later.
profiles.confirm_hard_delete: Delete this profile permanently? This cannot be undone.
profiles.confirm_reset_library: Delete every profile in the library permanently? This cannot be undone.
profiles.draft_ready_meta: Draft ready. Add profile details and browser rules, then save.
profiles.status_draft_ready: Draft ready. Enter a unique profile name and save when you are ready.
profiles.create_name_required: Profile name is required to create a draft.
profiles.status_revision_conflict: This profile changed in another tab. Reload it before saving again.
profiles.conflict_body: The saved profile has newer changes. Reload latest to review them, save your local draft as a copy, or overwrite the newer saved version.
profiles.conflict_revision_detail: Saved revision {current}; this editor started from revision {expected}.
profiles.conflict_overwrite_confirm: Overwrite the newer saved profile with this editor version? Newer changes from another tab will be replaced.
profiles.error_expected_policies_object: Expected policies to be an object
profiles.error_api_profile_name_exists: Profile with this name already exists.
profiles.error_api_revision_conflict: This profile changed in another tab.
profiles.error_api_schema_unavailable: Schema for profile {profile} is not available.
